title: No Base Origins
description: Disables and hides all default origins, including Human.
body:
## What is this mod?

**No Base Origins** is a mod for Origins
that prevents the base origins, **including Human**,
from being seen or selected by players.

If you are making a modpack with modded origins, but don't want to use the default ones, this is what you want.

## What do I need?

**No Base Origins** requires [Origins](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins) on Fabric, or [Origins-Forge](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-forge) on Forge.

<details>
<summary>I want to disable the base origins, except Human!</summary>

There is a mod/datapack for that! Check out [Unoriginal](https://modrinth.com/datapack/unoriginal), made by [aninuscsalas](https://modrinth.com/user/aninuscsalas), which disables all base origins **except Human**.

</details>
